title: neoporteria lindleyi
intro: Neoporteria lindleyi, also known as the Lindley's aloe, is a species of succulent plant in the family Asphodelaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its latex, which contains aloin, a compound with anti-inflammatory and wound-healing properties. The health benefits of Neoporteria lindleyi include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Neoporteria lindleyi include topical ointments and creams, as well as oral supplements in the form of capsules or tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and immune function.
